docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY SU, MEIYI AS TO DEFENDANT SUSAN, COLLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SU, MEIYI AS TO DEFENDANT SUSAN, COLLEY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-10-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SUSAN, COLLEY
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY SU, MEIYI SUSAN, COLLEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-17-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MEIYI SU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COLLEY SUSAN IS PRESENT. MANDARIN INTERPRETER AIDONG NI INTERPRETS FOR BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SU, MEIYI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUSAN, COLLEY $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
